Package com.dtwthalion.ttio.importers

Class CVTermMapper

java.lang.Object
com.dtwthalion.ttio.importers.CVTermMapper
public final class CVTermMapper extends Object
Maps PSI-MS and nmrCV controlled-vocabulary accessions to TTIO model values (precision, compression, array role, spectrum metadata).

API status: Stable.

Cross-language equivalents:
Objective-C: TTIOCVTermMapper · Python: ttio.importers.cv_term_mapper

Since:
0.6

  • Method Details

    • activationMethodFor

      public static Enums.ActivationMethod activationMethodFor(String accession)
      (M74) Resolve a PSI-MS activation-method accession to the matching Enums.ActivationMethod constant, or null if the accession does not name a recognised activation method.

    • activationAccessionFor

      public static String[] activationAccessionFor(Enums.ActivationMethod method)
      (M74) Two-element ``[accession, name]`` pair for emitting an <activation> cvParam from an ActivationMethod, or null for Enums.ActivationMethod.NONE. Callers gate emission of the cvParam on ms_level >= 2 and a non-null return here.

    • arrayRoleFor

      public static String arrayRoleFor(String accession)

    • isPrecisionAccession

      public static boolean isPrecisionAccession(String accession)
      Returns:
      true iff accession is one of the four known precision accessions (MS:1000521, MS:1000523, MS:1000519, MS:1000522). Callers that need to distinguish "is this a precision cvParam?" from "what precision?" should gate on this before calling precisionFor(java.lang.String).

    • precisionFor

      public static Enums.Precision precisionFor(String accession)
      Returns:
      the Enums.Precision implied by accession. For unknown accessions returns Enums.Precision.FLOAT64 as a safe default, matching ObjC +precisionForAccession: and Python precision_for(accession). Callers that need to distinguish "unknown" from "FLOAT64" should gate on isPrecisionAccession(java.lang.String) first.

    • isZlib

      public static boolean isZlib(String accession)

    • nucleusNormalize

      public static String nucleusNormalize(String raw)
